document_references.description: Documents Dr. Tran's telephone call with Sarah Mitchell to review annual lab results. Covers review of CBC, CMP, and lipid panel findings (all normal except mildly elevated triglycerides at 152 mg/dL attributed to quetiapine), dietary counseling for hypertriglyceridemia, and provision of a 90-day naltrexone refill with plan to coordinate prescribing with Dr. Patel.

diagnostic_reports.description: CBC reviewed during telephone call; all values within normal limits. No individual component values documented.
CMP reviewed during telephone call; all values within normal limits. No individual component values documented.
Lipid panel reviewed during telephone call. Triglycerides mildly elevated at 152 mg/dL; remaining components within normal limits but individual values not documented.
